app.title: PsicoMetrics
app.subtitle: Official Personality Tests
app.description: Psychological assessments based on validated scientific standards

big_five.name: Big Five / OCEAN
big_five.description: The most validated scientific standard in personality psychology. Measures the Big Five traits with 120 IPIP-NEO items.

mbti.name: MBTI — Myers-Briggs
mbti.description: Personality type indicator with 4 dichotomies. The most used test in companies and professional development.

enneagram.name: Enneagram
enneagram.description: Identifies your dominant personality type with 9 types and wings. Based on the Riso-Hudson Enneagram.

disc.name: DISC
disc.description: Behavioral profile with 4 dimensions. Ideal for understanding communication and teamwork styles.

dark_triad.name: Dark Triad — SD3
dark_triad.description: Short Dark Triad (SD3) by Jones & Paulhus (2014). Measures Machiavellianism, Narcissism, and Psychopathy with 27 items.

human_design.name: Human Design
human_design.description: System based on astrology, I Ching, and energy centers. Calculates your Type, Strategy, and Authority from your birth data.

human_design.time_note: Exact time is important for accurate calculation
